ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  "parent_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent project (if applicable) */,
  "project_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* List of keywords or tags to categorize and search for projects */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Brief description of the project's main objective */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Brief description of the project's methodology */,
  "expected_outcomes" TEXT /* Brief description of the expected outcomes of the project */,
  "progress" REAL /* Percentage of project progress */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track when the project details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_parent_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person involved */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the person in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the person's involvement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the person's involvement */,
  "hours_contributed" REAL /* Number of hours the person contributed to the project */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution the person made (e.g., research, admin, management) */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate whether the person is currently involved in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_personnel_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_personnel_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the sponsor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the sponsor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsor (e.g., government, private, university) */,
  "sponsor_website" TEXT /* Sponsor's website URL */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Sponsor's contact phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "value" REAL /* Amount of funding provided */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the funding */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., grant, contract, donation) */,
  "funding_agreement" TEXT /* Reference to the funding agreement document */,
  "disbursement_schedule" TEXT /* Disbursement schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the milestone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "milestone_type" TEXT /* Type of milestone (e.g., major, minor, critical) */,
  "milestone_status_date" TEXT /* Timestamp to track when the milestone status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliverables" (
  "deliverable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deliverable */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the deliverable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deliverable */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the deliverable */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deliverable (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the deliverable document */,
  "deliverable_type" TEXT /* Type of deliverable (e.g., report, dataset, software) */,
  "deliverable_format" TEXT /* Format of the deliverable (e.g., PDF, CSV, EXE) */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the deliverable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deliverable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliverables_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the outcome (e.g., publication, patent, technology transfer) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., publication, patent, technology transfer) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Description of the impact of the outcome */,
  "outcome_status" TEXT /* Status of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outcome */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "journal_issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the journal */,
  "journal_ISSN" TEXT /* ISSN of the journal */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the publication */,
  "citation_list" TEXT /* List of citations for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES outcomes ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patents" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outcome */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the patent */,
  "application_number" TEXT /* Application number */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the patent (e.g., pending, granted) */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Filing date of the patent */,
  "grant_date" TEXT /* Grant date of the patent */,
  "patent_status_date" TEXT /* Timestamp to track when the patent status was last updated */,
  "patent_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the patent */,
  "patent_claims" TEXT /* Description of the patent claims */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patents_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES outcomes ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* User's job title */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* List of areas of expertise for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp to track when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the project */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the project */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., report, data, image) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version number of the file */,
  "file_uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_file_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("file_uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
